overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character walking through a rainy night market in Saint Denis. The scene transitions from narrow cobblestone alleys lined with wooden market stalls to wider historic streets and finally through a covered stone archway into a fountain plaza, all illuminated by warm string lights and gas lamps reflecting off wet ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market alley with fruit stalls and string lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow cobblestone market alley lined with wooden stalls and sacks of goods

entered.detail: dense canopy of warm white string lights spanning the alley overhead
wooden market stall with canvas awning and visible signage
rustic wooden stall with goods displayed on tables
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, rain-soaked market alley illuminated by dense string lights overhead. Wooden market stalls line both sides of the cobblestone path, with sacks and barrels visible among the goods. The warm glow of gas lamps reflects off the wet ground as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide historic street with two-story buildings

events.description: exits narrow market alley into wider cobblestone street with wooden fences
horse rider passes by on the right moving in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking down wider street with historic two-story buildings and wooden fences lining the path

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback trotting past in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall wooden plank fence running along the right side of the street
historic brick building with wrought iron balcony on second floor
dark horse with rider wearing period clothing

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider cobblestone street flanked by wooden fences and historic two-story buildings with wrought iron balconies. The rain continues to fall as the character walks past a horse and rider moving in the opposite direction. The market stalls give way to open street with sparse string lights visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market passage leading to fountain plaza

events.description: enters stone archway into covered market passage with stairs
exits covered passage into open plaza with central stone fountain

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs through archway into covered market passage then descending into open plaza

entered.detail: large stone archway entrance leading to covered market area
roofed corridor with stone stairs and dense string lighting
multi-tiered stone fountain in the center of the plaza
illuminated sign reading BAKERY on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters a stone archway leading into a covered market passage with stairs. After passing through the sheltered corridor with dense overhead lighting, the scene opens into a spacious plaza featuring a central stone fountain. Market stalls and a visible bakery sign line the perimeter as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked night market that transitions from narrow, crowded alleys into a spacious urban plaza. It begins by following a character through a tight cobblestone path lined with wooden stalls, sacks, and barrels, where the warm glow of overhead string lights reflects off the wet ground. As the character moves forward, the alley opens into a wider historic street flanked by two-story buildings with wrought iron balconies, passing a horse and rider amidst the falling rain. The scene then shifts as the camera enters a sheltered stone archway and moves through a covered passage with dense lighting. Finally, the corridor opens into a large plaza featuring a central stone fountain and a bakery sign, with the rain continuing to fall across the open square.
